text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you shouldn't have. Thank you for the 
birthday wishes!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hweh?! W-We were just about to wish you happy birthday, but now you've already thanked us…!?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Always stay one step ahead! 
That's the Bakushin birthday way!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What?! Already racing into next 
year — that's the Bourbon speed 
I know!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But speed happens to be my forte as well! 
Thank you for next next year's birthday 
wishes!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Then happy next next next birthday.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You've done it again, Bourbon! Well then, 
thank you for next next next next year's 
birthday wishes!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: How did this turn into a competition…
